questionText: Break down your gross Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions between your consolidated accounting group and other entities included in your response.
questionKo: 귀사의 총 Scope 1 및 Scope 2 배출량을 회계상 연결실체(종속기업/자회사 등)과 응답에 포함한 기타 피투자자로 구분하여 입력하십시오.
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Awareness of emissions associated with the consolidated accounting group enables the organization to target actions to reduce emissions. The breakdown also provides data users with the opportunity to better understand the emissions sources and therefore risks and opportunities throughout the business.

columns.popup_help: The sum of both rows should be equal to the figure provided in row "Reporting year", column 1 of 7.6.
columns.popup_helpKo: The sum of both 행 해야 합니다 be equal to the figure 입력 in 행 "보고연도", 열 1 of 7.6.

columns.popup_help: The sum of both rows should be equal to the figure provided in row "Reporting year", column 1 of 7.7.
columns.popup_helpKo: The sum of both 행 해야 합니다 be equal to the figure 입력 in 행 "보고연도", 열 1 of 7.7.

columns.popup_help: The sum of both rows should be equal to the figure provided in row "Reporting year", column 2 of 7.7.
columns.popup_helpKo: The sum of both 행 해야 합니다 be equal to the figure 입력 in 행 "보고연도", 열 2 of 7.7.

guidance.text:
General 
The "Consolidated accounting group" refers to the group of entities for which information is included within your annual financial statements. For example, for an organization applying IFRS Accounting Standards, this group would comprise the parent organization and its consolidated subsidiaries. 
"All other entities" refers to any entities for which you have included emissions data for in 7.6 and 7.7, but do not fall within the consolidated accounting group. For example, for an entity applying IFRS Accounting Standards, these entities would include associates, joint ventures, and unconsolidated subsidiaries. 
If your response does not include any other entities, enter 0 in each column for the "All other entities" row, and specify this in column 4 "Please explain".
The figures reported in this question should be a breakdown of the emissions reported for Scope 1 and Scope 2 in 7.6 and 7.7 respectively. Therefore:
Figures reported for Scope 1 (across both rows of column 1) should add up to those reported in 7.6.
Figures reported for Scope 2 (across both rows of column 2) should add up to those reported in 7.7
Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e) (column 2) 
This column only appears if "We are reporting a Scope 2, location-based figure" is selected in 7.3 column 1. 
Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e) (column 3) 
This column only appears if "We are reporting a Scope 2, market-based figure" is selected in 7.3 column 2. 
Please explain (column 4) 
Provide a short description of what is included in each row, along with the approach you have taken to determining what is included in the consolidated accounting group.
guidance.textKo: 일반 The "Consolidated accounting group" refers to the group of entities for which information is included within your annual 재무제표. For example, for an organization applying IFRS Accounting 기준, this group would comprise the parent organization 및 its consolidated subsidiaries. "All other entities" refers to 하나 이상 entities for which you have included 배출량 데이터 for in 7.6 및 7.7, but do not fall within the consolidated accounting group. For example, for an entity applying IFRS Accounting 기준, these entities would include associates, joint ventures, 및 unconsolidated subsidiaries. 만약 your response does not include 하나 이상 other entities, enter 0 in each 열 에 대한 "All other entities" 행, 및 specify this in 열 4 "시장기반 Scope 2 배출량(metric tons CO2e)". The figures 보고 in this 문항 해야 합니다 be a breakdown 의 emissions 보고 for Scope 1 및 Scope 2 in 7.6 및 7.7 respectively. Therefore: Figures 보고 for Scope 1 (across both 행 of 열 1) 해야 합니다 add up to those 보고 in 7.6. Figures 보고 for Scope 2 (across both 행 of 열 2) 해야 합니다 add up to those 보고 in 7.7 Scope 2, 지역기반 (미터톤 CO2e) (열 2) This 열 only appears 만약 "We are reporting a Scope 2, 지역기반 figure" is 선택 in 7.3 열 1. Scope 2, 시장기반 (미터톤 CO2e) (열 3) This 열 only appears 만약 "We are reporting a Scope 2, 시장기반 figure" is 선택 in 7.3 열 2. 시장기반 Scope 2 배출량(metric tons CO2e) (열 4) Provide a short description of what is included in each 행, along with the approach you have taken to determining what is included in the consolidated accounting group.

guidance.text: Companies are transparent about their emissions inventories, including the emissions associated with the consolidated accounting group.
guidance.textKo: Companies are transparent about their emissions inventories, 포함 the emissions associated with the consolidated accounting group.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.

simpleHelpKo: Awareness of emissions associated with the consolidated accounting group enables the organization to 목표 actions to reduce emissions. The breakdown also provides 데이터 사용자 with the opportunity to better understand the emissions sources 및 therefore 리스크 및 기회 throughout the business.
